title: Simple Transparent GUI [STG]
description: Simple / Fast / Support Mods / And more...
body:
# Simple Transparent Gui 
- A very Simple And Fast Gui Helpfull for PvP Player or Normal Players.
# Compatablte
- The GUI Well Work More After 1.22.x Anther Thing The GUI Work In Older Vertions Than 1.20.x But You Might See Some Bugs.
# Supported Mods
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat).
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei).
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).
- [No Chat Reports](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-chat-reports)
- [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)
- [Client Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort)
- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements)
- [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- [Trade Cycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling)
- [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)
# Changes
- Change The Font Of the Game 
- Change the Game Title Menu background
- Nice And Clean GUI to All the GUI In The Game
# More Info
- The GUI Well Get More Mod Support With Every Verstion.
- If You Got Any Bugs Fix or Wont To Report It Please Vist My Discord Server
- Help Me By Dawnloading The GUI I Well Appreciate This
# Linices
- No One Allow To Upload This Pack At Any Webside 
- Feel Free To Add This Pack To Your Modpack
